languages.text:
The cyber-eagle gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and deals +250% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Whenever the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} by any attack (except the cyber-eagle's attacks), the cyber-eagle attacks that enemy, dealing +100% more damage up to {uip|Count|a2d3b06bb12c4fa9ab73a1273eb4c3d0} times per round. If this attack hits, the enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
The cyber-eagle gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and deals +250% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Whenever the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} by any attack (except the cyber-eagle's attacks), the cyber-eagle attacks that enemy, dealing +100% more damage up to {uip|Count|a2d3b06bb12c4fa9ab73a1273eb4c3d0} times per round. If this attack hits, the enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}.

languages.text:
The cyber-eagle gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and deals +250% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Whenever the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} by any attack (excluding the cyber-eagle's attacks) for the first {uip|Count|a2d3b06bb12c4fa9ab73a1273eb4c3d0} times in a round, the cyber-eagle attacks that enemy as well, dealing +100% more damage. If this attack hits, the enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Киберорел получает +20 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятию{/g} и +250% к наносимому {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урону{/g}.
Когда враг, чей {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}обзор заблокирован{/g}, получает {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадание{/g} (кроме атак киберорла), киберорел атакует этого врага, нанося на 100% больше урона. Если происходит попадание, враг оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}ошеломлен{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
The cyber-eagle gains +20 Agility and Perception and deals +250% more damage.
Whenever the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy is hit by any attack (except the cyber-eagle's attacks), the cyber-eagle attacks that enemy dealing +100% more damage. If this attack hits, the enemy becomes staggered.

The cyber-eagle gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and deals +250% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

If this attack hits, the enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}.

If this attack hits, the enemy becomes {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}.

languages.text:
Siber kartal, +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} niteliği kazanır. +%250 daha fazla hasar verir.
{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}Engellenen{/g} düşman herhangi bir saldırı (siber kartalın saldırıları hariç) tarafından {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulduğunda{/g} siber kartal, bu düşmana saldırarak +%100 daha fazla {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir. Saldırı vurursa düşman {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}.

{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}Engellenen{/g} düşman herhangi bir saldırı (siber kartalın saldırıları hariç) tarafından {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulduğunda{/g} siber kartal, bu düşmana saldırarak +%100 daha fazla {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir. Saldırı vurursa düşman {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}afallar{/g}.

languages.text:
La ciberáguila recibe +20 de Agilidad y Percepción e inflige un +250 % de daño adicional.
Cada vez que el enemigo {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstruido{/g} sea alcanzado por cualquier ataque (excepto los de la ciberáguila), la ciberáguila ataca a ese enemigo y le inflige un +100 % de daño adicional. Si este ataque impacta, el enemigo queda desequilibrado.
languages.original_text:
The psyber-eagle gains +20 Agility and Perception and deals +250% more damage.
Whenever the {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstructed{/g} enemy is hit by any attack (except the psyber-eagle's attacks), the psyber-eagle attacks that enemy, dealing +100% more damage. If this attack hits, the enemy becomes staggered.

languages.text:
生化猎鹰的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}提高20点，造成的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}提高250%。
每当{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}视野遮蔽{/g}的敌人受到攻击时（生化猎鹰的攻击除外），生化猎鹰都会立刻攻击该名敌人，造成100%额外伤害。如果此次攻击{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}目标，则目标陷入{g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}恐慌{/g}状态。

生化猎鹰的敏捷、感知提高20点，造成的伤害提高250%。

生化猎鹰的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}提高20点，造成的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}提高250%。

languages.text:
Der Cyber-Adler erhält +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} und verursacht +250 % mehr {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.
Wenn der {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}gehinderte{/g} Gegner von einem beliebigen Angriff (außer denen des Cyber-Adlers) {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}getroffen{/g} wird, greift der Cyber-Adler diesen Gegner an und verursacht +100 % mehr Schaden. Trifft dieser Angriff, gerät der Gegner ins {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumeln{/g}.
languages.original_text:

traits.locale_text:
Der Psitech-Adler erhält +20 Beweglichkeit und Wahrnehmung und verursacht +250 % mehr Schaden.
Wenn der {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}gehinderte{/g} Gegner von einem beliebigen Angriff (außer denen des Psitech-Adlers) getroffen wird, greift der Psitech-Adler diesen Gegner an und verursacht +100 % mehr Schaden. Trifft dieser Angriff, gerät der Gegner ins Taumeln.

Der Cyber-Adler erhält +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} und verursacht +250 % mehr {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.

Trifft dieser Angriff, gerät der Gegner ins {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumeln{/g}.

Der Cyber-Adler erhält +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} und verursacht +250 % mehr {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.

Trifft dieser Angriff, gerät der Gegner ins {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Taumeln{/g}.

languages.text:
Le cyber-aigle reçoit un bonus d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} et de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} de +20 et inflige +250 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} supplémentaires.
Chaque fois qu'un ennemi {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstrué{/g} est {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touché{/g} par une autre attaque (sauf les attaques du cyber-aigle), le cyber-aigle l'attaque et lui inflige +100 % de dégâts supplémentaires. Si cette attaque touche la cible, elle subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g}.
languages.original_text:

traits.locale_text:
Le psyber-aigle reçoit un bonus d'Agilité et de Perception de +20 et inflige +250 % de dégâts supplémentaires.
Chaque fois qu'un ennemi {g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}obstrué{/g} est touché par une autre attaque (sauf les attaques du psyber-aigle), le psyber-aigle l'attaque et lui inflige +100 % de dégâts supplémentaires. Si cette attaque touche la cible, elle subit l'effet Sidération.

Le cyber-aigle reçoit un bonus d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} et de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} de +20 et inflige +250 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} supplémentaires.

Si cette attaque touche la cible, elle subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}Sidération{/g}.

languages.text:
サイバーイーグルの敏捷性と認知力が+20され、与えるダメージが+250%上昇する。
{g|f:1e22c265a12744cc95a03d26b6c3cef9}妨害された{/g}敵が攻撃を受けた場合（サイバーイーグルの攻撃は除く）、サイバーイーグルはその敵に攻撃し、与えるダメージが+100%上昇する。この攻撃が命中すると、敵はよろけ状態となる。
